explanation: The user instructs not to put down the mug but to take it directly to the coffee machine. Currently, the mug is being held, so I do not need to place it down. I will go to the coffee machine, keep holding the mug, and place it there. The old plan included placing the mug on the countertop and then picking it up again, which is not required. The instruction specifies skipping the placement on the countertop and going straight to the coffee machine with the mug in hand.
